subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents were noted in detail. Although hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و بر تفصیل اطلاع حاصل گردید هر چند عسرت و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
